name: Melania Trump
bio: First Lady of the United States. Launched the $MELANIA memecoin on January 19, 2025 — the night before the inauguration — through MKT World LLC, a company she founded in 2021. The token briefly hit $2B market cap before crashing 98%. Insiders extracted $65M+ while retail investors lost billions.
one_liner: $65M extracted from memecoin launched night before inauguration

name: MKT World LLC
bio: Delaware LLC founded by Melania Trump in 2021. Originally used for NFT ventures, it became the issuing entity behind the $MELANIA memecoin. Withdrew $64.7M in primary sales and fees. Business address shared with Trump International Golf Club.
one_liner: $64.7M extracted, shares address with Trump golf club

name: Hayden Davis
bio: 28-year-old Texas crypto entrepreneur and CEO of Kelsier Ventures. Deployed the $MELANIA token and admitted to sniping both $MELANIA and $LIBRA tokens — buying before public announcements for outsized profits. Later orchestrated the $LIBRA token scandal tied to Argentine President Milei. Court filings allege his team 'weaponized fame to disarm diligence' in a sprawling crypto conspiracy.
role: Token Deployer — CEO of Kelsier Ventures
one_liner: Deployed $MELANIA, admitted to sniping, also behind $LIBRA scandal

name: Kelsier Ventures
bio: Crypto firm led by Hayden Davis that deployed the $MELANIA token smart contract on Solana. Also deployed the controversial $LIBRA token for Argentine President Milei. Earned tens of millions in trading fees and sniping profits across both tokens.

name: $MELANIA Token
bio: Solana memecoin launched January 19, 2025. 1 billion total supply with ~90% held by insiders. Peaked at $2B+ market cap, then crashed 98%. Top 10 wallets controlled 85%+ of supply. No utility, no roadmap — pure speculation on the Trump brand. Bubblemaps analysis showed Sybil-like wallet distribution to fake decentralization.

name: $LIBRA Token
bio: Controversial Solana memecoin deployed by Kelsier Ventures and promoted by Argentine President Javier Milei in February 2025. The same team that launched $MELANIA. The scandal led to calls for Milei's impeachment and exposed the cross-border memecoin grift pipeline.
one_liner: Same deployer as $MELANIA, nearly toppled Argentine president

name: Javier Milei
bio: President of Argentina who promoted the $LIBRA token, which was deployed by the same Kelsier Ventures team that deployed Melania Trump's $MELANIA token. The scandal led to massive political fallout in Argentina.
one_liner: Promoted $LIBRA token from same team as $MELANIA

name: Bill Zanker
bio: Longtime Trump associate who helped both Donald and Melania launch their memecoins. Operates Fight Fight Fight LLC ($TRUMP coin). Co-authored a book with Trump in 2007. The connective tissue between $TRUMP and $MELANIA operations.
one_liner: Helped launch BOTH Trump family memecoins

name: Fight Fight Fight LLC
bio: Entity that controls the $TRUMP memecoin. Operated by Bill Zanker. Along with CIC Digital LLC, holds 80% of all $TRUMP tokens. Generated $362M in fees. $TRUMP dropped 40% when $MELANIA launched two days later.

name: World Liberty Financial
bio: Trump family crypto venture. Combined with $TRUMP ($362M) and $MELANIA ($65M), the Trump family's crypto empire has extracted over $1 billion.

name: Donald Trump
bio: 47th President. Combined crypto earnings: $362M from $TRUMP, $550M from WLF, family share of $MELANIA profits.
